text: In this strange, angular hallway, I feel slightly disoriented by the tilted perspective; the light is sterile, the silence almost pressing. Yet, as I enter the vibrant R+D exhibit, a sense of curiosity and anticipation awakens in me. The patterns, colors, and glowing words spark questions about the dynamic relationship between humans and machines. I feel alive with possibility, wondering how technology not only changes the world, but changes the very way I perceive it now, in this moment.
